💙Are You Okay?

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: May 26, 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to "Are You Okay?". We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we handle, collect, and safeguard your information when you use our emotional tracking mobile application and website services.

2. Data We Collect

To provide our daily check-in and safety alert services, we may collect the following categories of information:

  • Profile Information: Name, birth year, gender, and profile photo, which helps customize your dashboard.
  • Emotional Log Data: Your daily check-in entries, logged mood tags, optional written journals, and optional voice notes.
  • Emergency Contacts: Email addresses of trusted family members or friends that you explicitly choose to notify if you become inactive.

3. How We Use Your Data

We utilize your information solely to deliver and improve the &quot;Are You Okay?&quot; experience, specifically to:

  • Track your emotional health history and streak progression.
  • Deliver secure alert notifications to your trusted contacts if you fail to check in for your preset duration.
  • Provide empathetic advice generated by our AI counselor.
  • We do NOT sell your personal data or emotional logs to any third-party advertisers.

4. Data Storage & Security

All personal information, written journals, and voice records are safely stored on secure Supabase servers. We implement industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect against unauthorized access, disclosure, or alteration of your emotional data.

5. In-App Subscriptions & Billing

We offer in-app purchases and auto-renewable subscriptions (Pro and Premium tiers) to unlock advanced features. All billing, purchases, and subscriptions are securely processed and verified through Apple App Store (iOS) or Google Play Store (Android) using the RevenueCat SDK.

6. Children&apos;s Privacy

Our services are intended for a general audience. We do not knowingly collect personal identifiable information from children under the age of 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately to have it deleted.

7. Contact Us

If you have any questions or feedback regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact our support team at:

Email: loverhide.blog@gmail.com

© 2026 Are You Okay? Team. All rights reserved.
